name: backstage-plugin-frontend-system-migration
description: Migrates Backstage plugins from the legacy architecture to the new frontend system using the extension-based model.

scripts.test: npx codemod@latest jssg test -l tsx ./scripts/inventory.ts ./tests/inventory && npx codemod@latest jssg test -l tsx ./scripts/route-refs.ts ./tests/route-refs && npx codemod@latest jssg test -l tsx ./scripts/plugin-shell.ts ./tests/plugin-shell && npx codemod@latest jssg test -l tsx ./scripts/apis.ts ./tests/apis && npx codemod@latest jssg test -l tsx ./scripts/pages-hooks.ts ./tests/pages-hooks && npx codemod@latest workflow validate -w workflow.yaml
